overview.summary: This module owns the unified live E2E contract for isolated-session lifecycle, private upperdir routing, SetNs namespace teardown, network isolation, file-tool routing, and live isolated remount compaction while a caller is isolated. It exercises daemon ops `sandbox.isolation.enter`, `sandbox.isolation.status`, `sandbox.isolation.exit`, `sandbox.isolation.test_compact_remount`, `sandbox.file.read`, `sandbox.file.write`, `sandbox.file.edit`, `sandbox.command.exec`, and `sandbox.command.cancel`. Module config lives at `crates/e2e-test/tests/workspace-runtime-isolated/config/default.test.yml`.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Lifecycle Pin
checklist.description: Enter and status expose the same manifest pin, and exit unregisters the handle, releases the lease, and reports holder/cgroup teardown.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Private Persistence
checklist.description: Isolated writes and reads persist across tool calls while the handle is open and report isolated-network workspace/mutation fields.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace No Publish
checklist.description: Isolated write, edit, and exec paths do not publish through OCC or release public LayerStack leases.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Discard Exit
checklist.description: Exit evicts the private upperdir, and public or host reads cannot see isolated-only files afterward.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Network Isolation
checklist.description: A dedicated isolated netns and veth allow an isolated caller to bind a port already held in the container netns.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Same Netns Conflict
checklist.description: Reusing a port in the same namespace conflicts unless the isolated session has exited and cleaned the prior command.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Exit Cleanup
checklist.description: Exit or cancel drains long-lived isolated commands and removes namespace resources so re-enter starts cleanly.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Tool Routing Contract
checklist.description: File tools in isolated mode return explicit workspace, mode, mutation, publish, and conflict fields, then route back to host after exit.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Exec Private Discard
checklist.description: Exec writes inside isolated mode remain private while open, then disappear on exit without OCC publication.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Lifecycle Gates
checklist.description: Enter rejects active sandbox-bound background work, repeated enter reports an already-open or lifecycle-in-progress state, and exit drain timeout/retry remains stable.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Network Peer Block
checklist.description: Isolated callers can reach their own loopback service but cannot reach peer isolated sessions through namespace or bridge addresses.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Audit Trail
checklist.description: Enter, exit, and isolated tool calls keep teardown trace events, discarded-byte facts, and no-publish behavior observable through response meta and trace-store rows.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Ttl Eviction
checklist.description: Short test config TTL evicts idle isolated sessions and preserves coherent status/list-open behavior.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Cross Mode Consistency
checklist.description: Public writes from non-isolated callers can advance OCC while an isolated caller is open, but the isolated pin/private upperdir stays stable and is discarded without overwriting public state.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Compact Remount
checklist.description: An open isolated session can compact/remount onto a bounded lowerdir set while preserving public snapshot and private upperdir state, and non-open host callers report `not_open`.

checklist.title: Isolated Workspace Daemon Restart Reconciliation
checklist.description: A hard daemon restart runs startup orphan reconciliation, reaping an open isolated handle so `list_open` empties, releasing its snapshot lease with none stranded, and serving fresh isolated enters again.

test.name: isolated_lifecycle_and_teardown
test.description: Groups `enter_status_exit_pin_and_teardown`, `isolated_enter_status_reports_manifest_pin`, `isolated_exit_discards_private_upperdir`, and `isolated_exit_reports_dedicated_netns`: enter/status pins must match, exit must unregister and tear down resources, and re-enter must start cleanly.

test.name: isolated_lifecycle_gates_and_audit
test.description: Uses `enter_rejects_active_command_and_repeated_enter_reports_already_open`: active commands block enter and repeated enter reports already-open, with teardown cleanup and no-publish facts trace-visible.

test.name: isolated_private_file_routing
test.description: Groups `isolated_write_is_discarded_on_exit`, `isolated_read_after_exit_routes_ephemeral`, `isolated_write_response_fields`, and `isolated_read_file_sees_private_upperdir`: private file state is visible while open, carries isolated response fields, disappears after exit, and later reads route host.

test.name: isolated_no_publish_contract
test.description: Groups `isolated_write_does_not_publish_or_release_lease` and `isolated_edit_conflict_response_fields`: isolated write/edit paths must avoid OCC publication and public lease release while preserving explicit conflict response fields.

test.name: isolated_port_matrix
test.description: Groups `cross_mode_same_port_no_conflict`, `same_mode_same_port_conflicts`, `isolated_exit_reports_dedicated_netns`, and `isolated_to_isolated_same_port_matrix`: cross-namespace same-port binds must work, same-namespace binds must conflict, netns/veth teardown must be visible, and two isolated callers can bind the same port independently.

test.name: isolated_peer_block
test.description: Uses `isolated_loopback_service_is_not_reachable_from_peer_session`: one isolated caller can reach its own loopback service while another isolated caller on the same daemon receives a blocked/refused loopback probe.

test.name: isolated_exec_private_discard
test.description: Adds `isolated_exec_write_is_private_and_discarded`: `sandbox.command.exec` writes inside isolated mode are readable while open, never OCC-published, and gone after exit.

test.name: isolated_cross_mode_consistency
test.description: Groups `isolated_private_same_path_does_not_overwrite_public_publish` and `isolated_pin_hides_later_public_paths_until_exit`: same-path private isolated writes do not overwrite public publishes after exit, and an isolated manifest pin remains stable while later public paths stay hidden until the caller exits.

test.name: isolated_compact_remount
test.description: Groups `compact_remount_open_isolated_reclaims_old_lower_chain` and `compact_remount_reports_not_open_for_ephemeral_caller`: open isolated sessions compact/remount from a long public lowerdir chain to a bounded chain without losing private upperdir state, while host callers without an open isolated handle report `not_open`.

test.name: isolated_daemon_restart_reconciliation
test.description: Uses `daemon_restart_reaps_orphaned_isolated_handle`: an open isolated handle holds a snapshot lease, the daemon is hard-restarted, and startup reconciliation reaps the now-orphaned handle (`list_open` empty), leaves no stranded snapshot lease, and serves a fresh enter/exit cleanly afterward.
